name: prov-generated-inverse-declared
query: PREFIX prov: <http://www.w3.org/ns/prov#> ASK WHERE { prov:generated <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#inverseOf> prov:wasGeneratedBy }

name: prov-was-generated-by-domain-range-declared
query: PREFIX prov: <http://www.w3.org/ns/prov#> ASK WHERE { prov:wasGeneratedBy <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#domain> prov:Entity ; <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#range> prov:Activity }
